case_title: ZHUO QIAN WU VS. AAA OF NORTHERN CALIFORNIA, NEVADA & UTAH ET AL

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-29-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-29-2015 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID FLEISIG. PLAINTIFF PRESENT ONLY, ASSISTED BY CANTONESE INTERPRETER AMY LO. THE INTERPRETER'S IDENTIFICATION HAS BEEN VERIFIED, VIA EMPLOYEE BADGE OR OTHER DOCUMENTATION, PROVING CERTIFICATION OR REGISTRATION AND PHOTO IDENTIFICATION. THE INTERPRETER HAS ON OATH ON FILE WITH THE COURT. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FLEISIG. CLERK: J. BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-29-2015 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERICE $ 95.00 SERVED NOV-05-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT AAA OF NORTHERN CALIFORNIA, NEVADA & UTAH

AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY WU, ZHUO QIAN AS TO DEFENDANT AAA OF NORTHERN CALIFORNIA, NEVADA & UTAH WIN, SIVAPHONE SANDY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-29-2015 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WU, ZHUO QIAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WIN, SIVAPHONE SANDY $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $250.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,250.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FILED BY PLAINTIFF WU, ZHUO QIAN AS TO DEFENDANT AAA OF NORTHERN CALIFORNIA, NEVADA & UTAH
